title: Chronicles From Creation
description: A modpack designed around creating your own stories! this is an adventure/tech themed experience where you can fight through dungeons, explore the vast unknown, or settle down in a village and make it your own, & even space..? you get to Craft YOUR Story!
body:
This Modpack contains major mods such as (Create) and (Ad astra) that majorly overhaul the progression, along with plenty of immersion mods to elevate your sense of being in the world such as (Sound Physics Remastered) and (Ambient Sounds)

For the adventure and monster fighting folks, I've implemented the (Better Combat) mod and other weapon based mods so you can fight off monsters with more variation in weapons and with mods like (Deeper Dark) & (Deeper and Darker) that makes the deep dark harder and filled with more content ensuring adventurer satisfaction! as well as (AdventureZ) for nether monsters and bosses. 

And for those who love building and design there is of course (Rechiseled) and (Rechiseled: Create) for create compatibility I've added (Bedspreads) so you can put your banner designs on your beds, (Cycle Paintings) for easier to use paintings, and a few Diagonal mods for things such as glass panes and fences, (Farmers Delight) for better functional kitchens and food variety!! All that and more awaiting you in this modpack!
